query:
-- Find customers who have a bundle billing item but unassigned Internet/Mobile services
-- Use LEFT JOIN + IS NULL to find unassigned services (avoid subquery in ON clause)
SELECT 
  c.externalId as customerId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.externalId as bundleItemId,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.parsedContractMonths,
  bi.parsedSpeedTier,
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.provider,
  s.planName
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId AND bi.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%'
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId 
  AND s.serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Mobile') 
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'billing_platform_stub')
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId AND sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE sba.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 30;

-- Find customers who have a bundle billing item but unassigned Internet/Mobile services
-- Use LEFT JOIN + IS NULL to find unassigned services (avoid subquery in ON clause)
SELECT 
  c.externalId as customerId,
  c.name as customerName,
  bi.externalId as bundleItemId,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.parsedContractMonths,
  bi.parsedSpeedTier,
  s.externalId as serviceId,
  s.serviceType,
  s.provider,
  s.planName
FROM customers c
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId AND bi.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%'
JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId 
  AND s.serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Mobile') 
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'billing_platform_stub')
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId AND sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE sba.id IS NULL
ORDER BY c.name
LIMIT 30;
